message:
feat(core): add latency_model.rs — network calculus for formal worst-case latency guarantees (wa-283h4.16)

Implements min-plus algebra, arrival/service curves, delay/backlog bounds,
pipeline composition, and aggregate multiplexing. 27 unit tests + 45 proptest
properties covering algebraic laws, monotonicity, closed-form formulas, and
FrankenTerm-specific pipeline analysis.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
